title: bursa hiatula
intro: Bursa hiatula, also known as bladderwort or kidneywort, is a type of carnivorous plant that belongs to the family Lentibulariaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and help to reduce inflammation and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Bursa hiatula include its potential to aid in the treatment of kidney stones, bladder infections, and other urinary tract issues, as well as its ability to improve overall kidney function. Bursa hiatula can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
